backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the game backend, defining types (UserProfile, Monster, BattleLog, etc.) and mixing in blob storage, authorization, HTTP outcalls, and Stripe integrations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (cinematic attack animations, battle phases, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, React Query client, and dark-mode ThemeProvider.
Reusable animated monster/sprite component supporting multiple sizes, animation states, element badges, glow effects, and optional image or emoji rendering.
Canvas-based attack animation component that renders element-specific particle effects and projectiles (e.g., lightning bolts, fire, water) traveling from one position to another, with support for miss offsets and a completion callback.
frontend/src/components/BadgeDisplay.tsx: Displays a grid of dojo seal badges showing earned vs. unearned status, with element-specific colors and emojis for each dojo.
frontend/src/components/ElectricityEffec: Renders an animated SVG electricity effect with randomized lightning bolts and corner spark icons, with reduced bolt count and slower refresh rate on mobile devices.
frontend/src/components/EvolutionModal.t: Modal dialog that previews a Pokémon's stat increases before evolution, triggers an evolution mutation, and calls back with the evolved Pokémon data after an animation sequence.
frontend/src/components/HealthBar.tsx: Renders a labeled HP bar with element-colored name text and a color-coded fill (green/yellow/red) based on remaining health percentage, including a danger pulse animation state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky desktop header nav and a mobile header with a dropdown menu, plus a bottom tab bar for mobile navigation across the main game routes.
frontend/src/components/NinjaBattleSprit: Displays a ninja battle sprite image with element-specific glow effects and CSS animation classes for attacking, dodging, hit-recoil, and charging states, exposing a triggerCharge imperative handle via forwardRef.
frontend/src/components/PokemonBattleSpr: Renders a draggable Pokémon-style battle sprite with element-colored badge/glow, dodge detection via pointer drag, and hit/danger animation states.
frontend/src/components/ShadowClanEncoun: Displays a modal encounter screen for the Shadow Clan villains with animated dialogue lines cycling through member quotes and Battle/Flee action buttons.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: A share button that copies the current page URL to the clipboard, with a fallback selectable input and copy button for browsers lacking clipboard API support.
frontend/src/components/StrategyInput.ts: A text input form for entering ninja battle strategies that highlights detected ninja-themed keywords as tags below the input field.
frontend/src/components/StripePaymentSet: An admin-only collapsible panel that allows configuring Stripe payment settings (secret key and allowed countries) for enabling crystal purchases, visible only when Stripe is not yet configured.
frontend/src/components/TeamRocketEncoun: Renders a Team Rocket encounter modal that sequentially displays the classic Team Rocket motto lines, then shows Battle and Flee buttons with a blast-off animation on fleeing.
frontend/src/data/monsterData.ts: Defines TypeScript types and static data for the monster system, including elemental types, monster stats, moves, evolved forms, and display constants like colors and clan names.
frontend/src/data/pokemonData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and static data for local Pokémon used in the battle system, including starter Pokémon stats, moves, and evolution info, with Pikachu as the strongest.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data (user profiles, monsters, badges, battle logs, dojo challenges, and XP), with several features handled client-side via sessionStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for dark/light themes and elemental colors, and declares keyframe animations for battle effects and UI interactions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Battle.tsx: Full-featured turn-based battle page where the player selects a monster and fights a random opponent, handling animations, move cooldowns, health bars, and win/loss outcomes with profile saving.
frontend/src/pages/CrystalShop.tsx: Shop page displaying six elemental crystals purchasable via Stripe checkout, with login gating and Stripe configuration checks.
frontend/src/pages/GameHome.tsx: Main hub page showing the player's profile, total player count, animated background particles, and navigation cards linking to all major game sections.
frontend/src/pages/GameLore.tsx: Lore page presenting four narrative chapters about the game's world and clans, with a tab-style chapter selector and a banner image.
frontend/src/pages/GymBattles.tsx: Dojo challenge page listing six elemental dojos with difficulty ratings, allowing the player to select and challenge a dojo leader which redirects to the battle screen.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login landing page with animated background particles and an Internet Identity login button that redirects authenticated users to the game home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Displays a styled payment cancellation page with a red glow card, informing the user no charges were made and offering buttons to retry via the shop or return to the game home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Displays a styled payment success page with a green glow card, confirming an Elemental Crystal was added to inventory and providing navigation buttons to the roster or shop.
frontend/src/pages/PokemonRoster.tsx: Shows the authenticated user's ninja monster roster and crystal inventory, rendering all monsters from static data and displaying per-crystal quantities fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/ProfessorOakIntro.tsx: Implements a typewriter-style intro dialogue with Sensei Ryoku, then prompts the new user to enter a ninja name and clan before saving their profile and navigating to starter selection.
frontend/src/pages/StarterSelection.tsx: Renders a grid of all available elemental ninja monsters for the player to choose as their starter, storing the selection in sessionStorage and navigating to the game on confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/StoryCampaign.tsx: Displays a three-arc story campaign with 10 episodes each, allowing authenticated users to browse arcs via tab selection and view episode listings with element icons.
frontend/src/pages/TrainerProfile.tsx: React page displaying a logged-in trainer's profile, including ninja name, clan, victories, dojo seals, and achievements. Handles logout via Internet Identity and clears the React Query cache.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and cleaning URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark ninja/elemental theme with custom colors (fire, water, earth, wind, lightning, shadow), fonts, glow box shadows, elemental gradients, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (version 37) describing an original elemental ninja monster-battling RPG, listing existing features, architectural notes, and known issues for build planning.
